title: Tragacantha hermonea
taxonomy: Tragacantha hermonea is a species of plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This family, commonly known as legumes, consists of a wide variety of plants, including beans, peas, and lentils. The Tragacantha genus is part of the subfamily Faboideae, which is one of the largest subfamilies of Fabaceae. The classification of Tragacantha hermonea places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Fabales. Further classification may also include the family and genus ranks mentioned above, but these provide the primary categorization for this species.
